title: duranta costaricensis
intro: Duranta costaricensis is a tropical flowering plant species in the Verbena family, known for its vibrant blue flowers and attractive foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Duranta costaricensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Duranta costaricensis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
